title: Device Home Screen - Charge Case battery charging icon
scenario: Verify Charge Case battery icon shows charging sign when charger is plugged in and no charging sign when unplugged, with earbuds inside and case opened (Tern/Emu).
steps: 1. Plug the charger into the Charge Case.
2. For Tern and Emu: Ensure both earbuds are inside the Charge Case and the case is opened.
3. Observe the Charge Case battery icon on the display.
4. Verify that the battery icon shows a charging sign (e.g., lightning bolt or similar indicator).
5. Unplug the charger from the Charge Case.
6. Observe the Charge Case battery icon again.
7. Verify that the charging sign is no longer displayed.
expected: The Charge Case battery icon shows a charging sign when the charger is plugged in, and no charging sign when unplugged.
